summary: Verified end-to-end the 'Daily AI budget reached' sales-funnel behavior on freeRun.curiosityAsk. Backend pytest: 5/5 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_freerun_paused_funnel.py — (1) normal flow with DAILY_FREE_BUDGET_USD=3 returns paused=false, answer length >50, questionsUsed bumped 0→1; (2) with budget=$0.0005, call 1 returns real answer + questionsUsed=1, call 2 returns structured paused payload {answer:'', topicTag:null, limitReached:false, paused:true, pausedTier:'free', pausedMessage non-empty, retryAt='YYYY-MM-DDT00:00:00.000Z' (UTC midnight), questionsUsed=1 UNCHANGED, questionsTotal=3}; (3) 3 additional paused calls in a row never bump questionsUsed beyond 1 (verified via tRPC response AND a fresh freeRun.status DB-backed query); (4) cellarJournal.list row count is identical before and after 3 paused calls (no journal persistence on paused branch); (5) after restoring budget=$3 + restart, a fresh malic-acid question returns a real paused=false answer. Frontend Playwright on /free-run (430×900 mobile viewport): sent two questions back-to-back with budget=$0.0005 — first message rendered with data-testid='freerun-answer-card-<id>' on white bg with visible 'Deep Dive' button + counter went 0/3 → 1/3; second message rendered with data-testid='freerun-paused-card-<id>' on amber bg (rgb(254,243,199) = #FEF3C7), '✦ Daily AI budget reached' badge rendered via CSS text-transform:uppercase + fontWeight 700 in accent color rgb(176,116,26), 'Upgrade to Premium →' link with data-testid='freerun-paused-upgrade-<id>' and href='/pricing', ZERO buttons inside the paused card (Deep Dive correctly suppressed), and counter REMAINED at 1/3 after paused render (setQuestionsUsed not called in paused branch — confirmed). Regression: /stats, /tank-qr, /the-press/compare, /compliance, /free-run all return 200 with non-empty bodies and no overlay errors; 5 pre-existing global-query 400 console errors persist (documented in iteration_9, unrelated to this change). Env fully restored at end of run: DAILY_FREE_BUDGET_USD=3, DAILY_LLM_BUDGET_USD=10, DAILY_PREMIUM_BUDGET_USD=8 (verified via curl /api/trpc/admin.llmStats → tiers.free.budgetUsd=3).
critical_code_review_comments: freeRunRouter.ts:134 — regex detection 'temporarily paused — Ownology has reached today' uses an em-dash (—, U+2014). If a future synthetic-message copy edit replaces it with a hyphen or en-dash, detection silently fails and the user gets billed AND the synthetic text gets journalled. Consider matching the more stable substring 'temporarily paused' (case-insensitive) or — cleaner — extending chatCompletion() to return {content, paused?} as the misc_info note acknowledges. Add a unit test that asserts the regex matches the exact string returned by forgeShim.ts buildBudgetExceededResponse().

freeRunRouter.ts:145 — pausedTier classification uses /free-tier/i.test(answer). The synthetic for the 'overall' cap also returns a message; verify it does NOT contain the substring 'free-tier' (otherwise overall-cap pauses would be mis-tagged as 'free' in the payload and the frontend may show the wrong upgrade copy). A small inline comment pointing at forgeShim.ts message templates would help future maintainers.

freeRunRouter.ts paused branch returns hard-coded English pausedMessage. The synthetic answer from the shim is discarded ('answer: ""'). If future i18n is added, only one message-source needs to be localised — current design is OK but worth noting.

FreeRun.tsx:444 — upgrade CTA is <a href='/pricing'> which forces a full-page navigation (not client-side React Router push). On a SPA this loses scroll restoration + flashes the brand splash. Consider <Link to='/pricing'> if wouter/react-router is in use.

FreeRun.tsx — paused message card shows 'Try again after <Sydney time>' even when pausedTier=='overall' (which affects all users globally, not just free tier). Copy could mention 'we'll reset at UTC midnight' more neutrally when tier=='overall'.
test_freerun_paused_funnel.py module-level autouse fixture restores env on teardown — good safety net. Could also wrap in try/finally inside each setup_class to guard against partial setup failures.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 assertions on /free-run paused rendering passed; 4 regression routes render OK)

test_credentials: None — dev-bypass injects seed-owner-001 as admin (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md).
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use existing freeRun.curiosityAsk; total spend <$0.01 across full run. Quota was reset to 0 before each test class via admin.resetFreeRunQuota.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel test file: /app/backend/tests/test_freerun_paused_funnel.py (5 tests, ~50s). Mutates /app/.env DAILY_FREE_BUDGET_USD (0.0005 ↔ 3) via supervisorctl restart backend; module-level autouse fixture restores to 3 on teardown. Paused-payload key set is {answer, topicTag, limitReached, paused, pausedTier, pausedMessage, retryAt, questionsUsed, questionsTotal} — verified exhaustively. Non-paused payload omits {pausedTier, pausedMessage, retryAt}. retryAt is always next UTC midnight ISO with literal suffix 'T00:00:00.000Z'. Frontend data-testids: freerun-answer-card-<msgId> (white bg, Deep Dive visible) vs freerun-paused-card-<msgId> (amber #FEF3C7 bg, '✦ Daily AI budget reached' badge via text-transform:uppercase, 'Upgrade to Premium →' anchor data-testid='freerun-paused-upgrade-<msgId>' href='/pricing'). cellarJournal.list response shape: {rows: Array} — use len(data['rows']) for persistence assertions. freeRun.status is the DB-backed truth source for questionsUsedToday — paused calls leave this unchanged. /stats /tank-qr /the-press/compare /compliance regress clean; 5 pre-existing 400 console errors on /stats (global query, iteration_9 documented, unrelated). Send input has no data-testid; selector used: input[placeholder='Ask a question...'] + button:has-text('Send').
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs. All review-request acceptance criteria verified. The em-dash in the detection regex (freeRunRouter.ts:134) is a latent fragility — see critical_code_review_comments[0]. The principled fix (chatCompletion returning {content, paused?}) is documented in the original review's other_misc_info as out-of-scope for this iteration.
